This conversation, recorded at our live show at Wilton’s Music Hall in London, is all about fundamentals: How Tarman, DB’s vice chair of global macro, and Singhal, the firm’s head of EM trading across rates, FX and Credit, make sense of conflicting headlines, whether the rally in tech stocks is to be believed

title: Only Half of Britain’s Young People Have Paid Work, IFS Says
title_cn: IFS 表示，英国只有一半年轻人有带薪工作
summary: Just half of 16 to 24-year-olds in the UK were in payrolled work at the end of last year, according to Institute for Fiscal Studies analysis that underscores the scale of the country’s escalating youth jobless crisis.

title: Goldman Sachs Targets ‘Huge Opportunity’ Despite Iran Shock
title_cn: 尽管伊朗震惊，高盛仍瞄准“巨大机遇”
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s international co-heads say the turbulent start to the year has done little to deter clients, underscoring Wall Street’s bullish outlook despite events like the Iran war.

title: Tech Leads Stocks Lower as Iran Deadlock Drags On: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着伊朗僵局的持续，科技股引领股市走低：市场结束
summary: A retreat in technology shares pulled stocks lower in the US and Asia. Oil fell modestly and Treasuries slipped as traders waited for signs of progress toward a peace deal in the Middle East.

title: Bond Market’s Woes Go Far Beyond the Price of Oil
title_cn: 债券市场的困境远远超出了石油价格
summary: Demographics, debt, AI also weigh on sovereign bonds

title: The AI Boom Is a Dilemma for Retail Investors
title_cn: 人工智能的繁荣让散户投资者陷入困境
summary: AI may be a fantastic long-term investment, but today’s frothy atmosphere increases the chances of real pain along the way.

title: Brazil Sends Cheap Soy Oil Abroad as Biodiesel Plan Stalls
title_cn: 由于生物柴油计划陷入停滞，巴西向国外出口廉价豆油
summary: The world’s top soybean producer Brazil is processing record amounts of the crop, but a delay in the country’s plans to boost local demand through biofuel mandates has resulted in an excess of cheap soy oil supplies being shipped overseas.

title: Citi Says 5.5% May Be Next Focus for 30-Year Treasury Yield
title_cn: 花旗表示 5.5% 可能是 30 年期国债收益率的下一个焦点
summary: Bond traders are zeroing in on 5.5% as the new “round number” for 30-year US Treasury yields as inflation concerns ripple across markets, according to Citigroup Inc.

title: Goldman Sachs Intl. Says Europe Has a 'Huge Opportunity'
title_cn: 高盛国际机场称欧洲拥有“巨大机遇”
summary: Goldman Sachs International co-CEOs Anthony Gutman and Kunal Shah discuss the outlook for Europe's capital markets, risks facing the global economy and the race to build out artificial intelligence infrastructure. They speak on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trafigura-Backed Terrafame Studies Producing Scandium in Finland
title_cn: 托克支持的 Terrafame 研究在芬兰生产钪
summary: Metals firm Terrafame is studying starting producing scandium, a material used in sectors including defense, from its existing uranium operation in Finland, as Europe seeks to secure supplies of critical minerals.

title: Fund Managers Boost Stock Allocations by a Record in BofA Poll
title_cn: 美国银行调查显示基金经理增加股票配置创历史新高
summary: Fund managers chasing the powerful rally in equities increased their allocations to stocks by the most on record this month, a Bank of America Corp. survey showed.

title: Ryanair Sees European Airline ‘Casualties’ on Jet Fuel Spike
title_cn: 瑞安航空看到欧洲航空公司因航空燃油飙升而“伤亡”
summary: Ryanair Holdings Plc Chief Executive Officer Michael O’Leary said there will be corporate “casualties” among European airlines if the Iran war continues and the Strait of Hormuz remains restricted.

title: Indonesian Markets Slump on Commodity Export Control Speculation
title_cn: 印尼市场因商品出口管制投机而暴跌
summary: Indonesian markets fell as speculation mounted that the government will centralize commodity exports to control capital flows and shore up a plunging currency. Palm oil futures rose.

title: New York Homes Most Exposed to Hurricane Risk, Beating Miami
title_cn: 纽约房屋最容易遭受飓风风险，击败迈阿密
summary: More than 3 million New York metropolitan-area homes are vulnerable to hurricane winds, the most of any region in the country, according to a report from Cotality, a property analytics firm.

title: Singapore Stocks Reclaim Record High on Haven Demand in Iran War
title_cn: 新加坡股市因伊朗战争避险需求而创历史新高
summary: Singapore stocks climbed to a record as investors sought defensive havens during volatility sparked by the Iran war.

title: Oil Declines After Trump Says He Called Off Strike on Iran
title_cn: 特朗普表示取消对伊朗的打击后油价下跌
summary: Oil fell after President Donald Trump said he’d called off a strike on Iran following an appeal by Persian Gulf allies.

title: Thailand Rolls Back Welcome Mat for Most Foreign Tourists
title_cn: 泰国取消对大多数外国游客的欢迎垫
summary: Thailand is rolling back some of its tourism friendly visa policies as the government seeks to crack down on crime and illegal employment involving foreign nationals, risking another setback for an industry that remains central to the economy.

title: EQT CEO Says New Tech Fund Will Help Europe’s Scale-Up Problem
title_cn: 殷拓首席执行官表示新技术基金将帮助欧洲解决规模扩大问题
summary: A new fund targeting Europe’s most promising startups will help the region create more global champions, according to the head of private equity group EQT AB.

title: New ASX CEO Must Drive Right Pace of Change, Outgoing Chief Says
title_cn: 即将离任的首席执行官表示，新任澳大利亚证券交易所首席执行官必须推动正确的变革步伐
summary: ASX Ltd.’s incoming chief Anthony Attia will need to strike a balance between accelerating the exchange operator’s market infrastructure development while ensuring its stakeholders are not left behind, according to the firm’s outgoing leader.

title: Incoming CEO of Poland’s Zabka Seeks to Build Europe’s 7-Eleven
title_cn: 波兰扎布卡 (Zabka) 即将上任的首席执行官寻求打造欧洲 7-11 便利店
summary: Poland’s leading convenience store chain, Zabka Group SA, will prioritize European expansion under its incoming chief executive officer.

title: Gold Retreats as Market Monitors Progress on Iran War Ceasefire
title_cn: 市场关注伊朗战争停火进展，金价回落
summary: Gold edged lower, retracing some of the previous day’s gain, as the market monitored developments around the US-Iran ceasefire.

title: Nickel Spikes After Report of Indonesian NPI Production Cut
title_cn: 印尼镍生铁减产消息传出后镍价飙升
summary: Nickel prices spiked following a report of further output cuts in Indonesia, the top producer of the metal.

title: Monzo’s Profit Jumps 44% as Fintech Moves Further Into Lending
title_cn: 随着金融科技进一步进军贷款领域，Monzo 的利润跃升 44%
summary: Monzo Bank Ltd. reported a 44% jump in profit in the year through March, as growth in lending lifted interest income.

title: Fish Feed Firm BioMar Set For Biggest Copenhagen IPO Since 2018
title_cn: 鱼饲料公司 BioMar 即将进行 2018 年以来哥本哈根最大规模 IPO
summary: Danish conglomerate Schouw & Co. set the price range for its initial public offering of fish feed producer BioMar on Tuesday, in what would be Copenhagen’s largest IPO since 2018.

title: India’s 360 ONE Seeks Up to $500 Million for Private Credit Fund
title_cn: 印度 360 ONE 寻求高达 5 亿美元的私人信贷基金
summary: India’s 360 ONE Asset Management is seeking to raise as much as $500 million for its sixth private credit fund, according to people familiar with the transaction, underscoring sustained investor appetite in the country even as fundraising slows elsewhere.

title: Deutsche Bank's Ozan Tarman and Aditya Singhal on Understanding the Macro Risks | Odd Lots
title_cn: 德意志银行的 Ozan Tarman 和 Aditya Singhal 谈如何理解宏观风险 |零股
summary: It is hard to have a markets conversation that isn't out of date within a minute or two. But we think this one, with Ozan Tarman and Aditya Singhal of Deutsche Bank, is basically evergreen. This conversation, recorded at our live show at Wilton's Music Hall in London, is all about fundamentals: How Tarman, DB's vice chair of global macro, and Singhal, the firm’s head of EM trading across rates, FX and Credit, make sense of conflicting headlines, whether the rally in tech stocks is to be believed, the tug of war between fast money and central bankers, and how traders are evaluating the difference between the AI models coming out of the US and China. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 5/19/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 5/19/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Fight Against Trump’s Immigration Crackdown
title_cn: 反对特朗普移民镇压的斗争
summary: Bloomberg Investigates spends a year following a group of lawyers as they sue the Department of Homeland Security and scramble to help free those arrested under Donald Trump's immigration policies. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ACS Drops on €2.1 Billion Share Sale to Fund Data Centers
title_cn: ACS 放弃出售 21 亿欧元股票以资助数据中心
summary: ACS Actividades de Construcción y Servicios SA shares declined after the Spanish company sold about a 6% stake to fund data centers and other AI-related infrastructure.

title: Global Inflation Weighs on G-7 as Higher Bond Yields Persist
title_cn: 债券收益率持续走高，全球通胀给七国集团带来压力
summary: Global finance chiefs are coming to terms with the new economic reality that a consumer-price shock they had hopes of skirting is looking likely to endure.

title: China’s YMTC Kicks Off IPO Process to Tap Booming Memory Demand
title_cn: 中国长江存储启动 IPO 进程，以满足蓬勃发展的内存需求
summary: Yangtze Memory Technologies Co. has begun the process for a long-awaited initial public offering, tapping red-hot demand for the chipmakers at the heart of a global AI development boom.

title: Crypto Crime Escalates With Kidnappings, Cons and Human Coercion
title_cn: 加密货币犯罪随着绑架、诈骗和人为胁迫而升级
summary: After a year of kidnappings, assaults and armed home invasions targeting cryptocurrency holders, the industry is racing to harden its defenses.

title: Barclays Says Robots May Offset 60% of China’s Population Slump
title_cn: 巴克莱银行称机器人可能抵消中国 60% 的人口下降
summary: China’s deployment of humanoid robots could offset as much as 60% of its projected decline in the labor force by 2035, according to Barclays Plc, helping sustain the world’s largest industrial base as the population shrinks at a pace not seen in decades.

title: KKR to Dump Kokusai Electric Stake as AI Spurs Share Rally
title_cn: AI 刺激股价上涨 KKR 将抛售国际电气股份
summary: Kokusai Electric Corp.’s biggest shareholder KKR & Co. is offloading its entire 10.6% stake about two and half years after the Japanese chip gear maker’s bumper initial public offering.

title: Google Agrees to Create AI Cloud Firm With Blackstone
title_cn: 谷歌同意与黑石创建人工智能云公司
summary: Alphabet’s Google agreed to create an artificial intelligence cloud business with Blackstone, aiming to compete with companies like CoreWeave in a burgeoning market. The project will rely on an initial $5 billion in equity capital from Blackstone, which will become the majority owner, according to a statement Monday. Bloomberg's Neil Campling explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: StanChart to Cut Thousands of Jobs in AI Push
title_cn: 渣打银行将在人工智能领域裁员数千人
summary: Standard Chartered said it plans to eliminate thousands of support roles over the next four years, joining the ranks of global lenders using artificial intelligence to trim headcount. “It’s not about cost cutting," Chief Executive Officer Bill Winters said at a press briefing in Hong Kong. "It's about having a structurally more productive environment that is fit for future." Bloomberg's Tom Metcalf reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Adds Second Musk Stock. It’s a Problem for Tesla
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股增加了第二支马斯克股票。这对特斯拉来说是个问题
summary: For years, there was only one way for mom-and-pop investors to buy into Elon Musk’s vision: shares of Tesla Inc. That’s about to change — and it’s a serious risk for Tesla investors.

title: Investors Flock to Japan Convertible as Borrowing Costs Spike
title_cn: 由于借贷成本飙升，投资者纷纷涌向日本可转换债券
summary: Japanese convertible bonds continue to attract solid investor demand as a surge in borrowing costs drives companies to increasingly embrace the equity-linked securities.

title: Xi Prepares To Host Putin After Summit With Trump | The China Show 5/19/2026
title_cn: 习近平准备在与特朗普峰会后接待普京|中国展 5/19/2026
summary: "Bloomberg: The China Show" is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fujikura Shares Plunge After Three-Year Forecast Dents AI Hope
title_cn: 三年预测削弱 AI Hope 后藤仓股价暴跌
summary: Fujikura Ltd. shares fell as much as 17% after its three-year forecast fell short of frothy expectations about artificial intelligence’s appetite for high-density optical-fiber networks.

title: Nintendo Shares Rebound as AI Fatigue Fuels Japan Stock Rotation
title_cn: 人工智能疲劳推动日本股市轮动，任天堂股价反弹
summary: Embattled Switch 2 maker Nintendo Co. enjoyed its biggest stock gain in two months on Tuesday as concerns about overvaluation in the AI sector sent investors on the hunt for bargains elsewhere.

title: Moonshot AI to Overhaul Structure to Win Nod for Hong Kong IPO
title_cn: Moonshot AI 将彻底改革架构以赢得香港 IPO 的批准
summary: Moonshot AI has informed its investors it will revamp its corporate structure to pave the way for an initial public offering in Hong Kong, aligning with Beijing’s tightened requirements for Chinese companies seeking an overseas debut.

title: Dexterous Robotic Hand Maker Linkerbot Is Said to Consider Hong Kong IPO
title_cn: 灵巧机械手Linkerbot据称考虑在香港IPO
summary: Linkerbot, a Chinese startup that specializes in making highly dexterous robotic hands, is considering an initial public offering in Hong Kong, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Asian Chip Export Prices Are Diverging From Volumes by Most Ever
title_cn: 亚洲芯片出口价格与出口量出现有史以来最大的差异
summary: A record divergence between prices and volumes of Asia’s chip exports is making regional trade more immune to external shocks, according to Oxford Economics.

title: BNP Paribas' Zhang on Investing in Physical AI
title_cn: 法国巴黎银行张先生谈物理人工智能投资
summary: Joy Zhang, APAC Capital Goods Analyst at BNP Paribas, says physical AI will be the ultimate application of the technology, paving the way for humanoid robots to enter daily life. She also discusses winners and losers in the space in an interview on Bloomberg’s The China Show. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Australia’s Top Pension Sees Agentic AI Disrupting Its Industry
title_cn: 澳大利亚顶级养老金看到智能人工智能正在颠覆其行业
summary: AustralianSuper, the country’s largest pension fund, said agentic artificial intelligence could transform how it serves its 3.5 million members, likening the technology’s potential impact to the disruption AI is driving across retail and consumer services.

title: Seagate Slips as CEO Says New Factories ‘Take Too Long’
title_cn: 首席执行官表示新工厂“需要太长时间”，希捷股价下滑
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings shares fell 6.9% Monday in its worst one-day drop in nearly two months after management comments at a JPMorgan conference sparked investor fears that the company won’t be able to keep up with soaring demand for memory chips.

title: Korean Stocks Drop 5% as Chip Slump Fuels Overheating Concerns
title_cn: 芯片暴跌引发过热担忧，韩国股市下跌 5%
summary: Supercharged gains in a handful of companies and weak market breadth are stoking concerns that the world’s hottest stock market is overheating in some pockets.

title: Google, Blackstone to Create AI Cloud Firm With In-House Chips
title_cn: 谷歌和黑石将创建拥有内部芯片的人工智能云公司
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google agreed to create an artificial intelligence cloud business with Blackstone Inc., aiming to compete with companies like CoreWeave Inc. in a burgeoning market.

title: Analog Devices Is Said to Near $1.5 Billion Deal for Empower
title_cn: 据称 Analog Devices 将以近 15 亿美元的价格收购 Empower
summary: Analog Devices Inc. is in advanced talks to acquire closely held Empower Semiconductor for $1.5 billion in cash, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: East Coast Power Surges as Heat Spurs Emergency Grid Alert
title_cn: 高温引发紧急电网警报，东海岸电力激增
summary: Wholesale power prices surged as heat descended on the US East, prompting the region’s grid operator to declare a low-level emergency for Tuesday.

title: New Zealand to Cut Public Service Jobs in Savings Push
title_cn: 新西兰将削减公共服务职位以促进储蓄
summary: New Zealand expects significant savings from an overhaul of its public service, which will eliminate about 8,700 jobs, merge some government departments and extend the use of AI.

title: Trafigura Turns to Tether as Stablecoins Take on Commodities
title_cn: 随着稳定币取代大宗商品，托克转向 Tether
summary: Commodity trading house Trafigura Group Pte Ltd. is in talks with Tether Inc. about a pilot project to use its stablecoin at fuel stations.

title: Meta Moves 7,000 Workers Into AI Roles Ahead of Job Cuts
title_cn: Meta 在裁员之前将 7,000 名员工调入人工智能岗位
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is reassigning 7,000 workers to new jobs related to artificial intelligence, according to an internal memo, part of a broad corporate restructuring that includes planned staff reductions later this week.

title: Stocks Fall, Oil Rises as Investors Eye Bonds | The Close 5/18/2026
title_cn: 投资者关注债券，股市下跌，油价上涨收盘价 2026 年 5 月 18 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Robinhood Markets CIO Stephanie Guild, Andersen Institute’s Fabio Natalucci, Wedbush Securities’ Dan Ives, IIF President & CEO Tim Adams, Kayne Anderson Rudnick’s Julie Biel, 42 Macro Founder & CEO Darius Dale, Westly Group Founder & Managing Partner Steve Westly, Moody’s Ratings Chief Credit Officer Atsi Sheth, Morningstar’s Christine Benz, WSL Strategic Retail CEO & Chief Shopper Wendy Liebmann (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia’s CEO Sees China Opening Market to AI Chips From US
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官认为中国向美国人工智能芯片开放市场
summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang, speaking days after he joined President Donald Trump’s summit in China, said he expects Chinese authorities to eventually allow the import of artificial intelligence chips from the US.

title: Elon Musk Loses Case Against Sam Altman Over OpenAI’s Overhaul
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 因 OpenAI 改革而败诉萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman)
summary: A jury rejected Elon Musk’s claims that OpenAI under Sam Altman’s leadership betrayed its mission to benefit the public by morphing into a for-profit business, finding that he waited too long to sue the company.

title: AI Chip Startup Tenstorrent Draws Takeover Interest From Intel, Qualcomm
title_cn: AI芯片初创公司Tenstorrent吸引了英特尔、高通的收购兴趣
summary: Artificial intelligence chip startup Tenstorrent Inc. is drawing early takeover interest from prospective buyers at a moment of renewed momentum for upstarts looking to challenge Nvidia Corp. and Advanced Micro Devices Inc.

title: AI 'Industrial Revolution' Taking Place, Says Boston Children's Chief Medical Officer
title_cn: 波士顿儿童医院首席医疗官表示，人工智能“工业革命”正在发生
summary: Dr. Joan LaRovere, chief medical officer at Boston Children’s Hospital, said that AI can 'bolster' the capabilities of health care providers to help diagnose and treat patients more effectively. Dr. LaRovere said that she believes the moment in time is like the 'industrial revolution' that can revolutionize health care.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kenya Transport Operators Suspend Strike for a Week for Talks
title_cn: 肯尼亚运输运营商暂停罢工一周进行谈判
summary: Kenya’s public transport operators agreed to suspend a strike over surging fuel costs that has paralyzed many urban centers in the East African nation.

title: Ukraine Sees US Looking for Technology Transfers in Drone Deal
title_cn: 乌克兰认为美国正在寻求无人机交易中的技术转让
summary: Kyiv has said that the US is seeking the transfer of technology and access to intellectual property rights from Ukraine as part of a drone deal that is awaiting approval at the highest political level, a person familiar with the matter said.

title: Slovenian Nationalist on Path to Be Premier for Fourth Time
title_cn: 斯洛文尼亚民族主义者第四次当选总理
summary: Slovenian nationalist leader Janez Jansa, who lost elections in March by a razor thin margin, is on a path to return as premier for a fourth time after lawmakers proposed him for the post on Tuesday.

title: Lula Reclaims Lead in Brazil Race as Bolsonaro Hit by Scandal
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗丑闻缠身，卢拉在巴西大选中夺回领先地位
summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva reclaimed his lead in Brazil’s presidential race as Senator Flavio Bolsonaro lost support amid revelations about his ties to a central figure in the country’s biggest banking fraud scandal, according to a new poll.

title: Trump-Massie Showdown Comes to a Head in Kentucky Primary Race
title_cn: 肯塔基州初选特朗普与马西的对决进入白热化阶段
summary: It’s decision day for Representative Thomas Massie.

title: Putin and Xi Are Friends But Far From Equals
title_cn: 普京和习近平是朋友，但远非平等
summary: The Russian and Chinese leaders will likely stress their “no-limits” friendship at tomorrow’s talks.

title: Japan’s Takaichi, South Korea’s Lee Vow Deeper Energy Ties
title_cn: 日本高市和韩国李在镕誓言深化能源联系
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi and South Korean President Lee Jae Myung vowed to boost cooperation on energy and security while deepening partnerships with other friendly nations amid increasing geopolitical uncertainty.

title: Oil Falls as Trump Says He Called Off Iran Strike
title_cn: 特朗普表示取消对伊朗的打击，油价下跌
summary: Oil declined as US President Donald Trump said he'd called off a planned strike on Iran at the request of Gulf allies, who noted that "serious negotiations" are underway. Bloomberg's Anthony di Paola reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Marcos Says Philippines Would Be Involved in Any Taiwan Conflict
title_cn: 马科斯称菲律宾将卷入任何台湾冲突
summary: The Philippines would likely be involved in any conflict over Taiwan due to its proximity to the island democracy claimed by China, President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. said, reiterating a stance that risks angering Beijing.

title: Trump Says He Held Off Bombing Iran After Gulf States Appealed
title_cn: 特朗普表示在海湾国家上诉后他推迟了对伊朗的轰炸
summary: US President Donald Trump said he called off a new bombardment of Iran planned for Tuesday after Saudi Arabia and other Persian Gulf allies wanted more time to pursue diplomacy.

title: Burnham Lays Blame at Thatcher’s Feet for Britain’s Struggles
title_cn: 伯纳姆将英国的困境归咎于撒切尔夫人
summary: Pitching to succeed Keir Starmer, Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham invoked the specter of another former British prime minister, Margaret Thatcher, as part of his bid to win back working-class voters.

title: Economic Outlook at Risk of Further Deterioration, OECD Says
title_cn: 经合组织表示经济前景面临进一步恶化的风险
summary: Risks to the global economy have worsened as the conflict in the Middle East drags on, OECD Secretary General Mathias Cormann said on the sidelines of a Group of Seven meeting.

title: Iran War: Trump Holds Off on New Strikes | Daybreak Europe 05/19/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：特朗普推迟新的打击|欧洲黎明 05/19/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, President Trump says he's called off fresh attacks on Iran that had been planned for Tuesday, after an appeal by leaders in the Middle East. The US President says Saudi Arabia, Qatar, the UAE and others have told him they're "getting very close to making a deal". Oil slipped on the news, but stocks in Asia and US futures fell, as optimism faded for a deal to end the war.

European Union officials are due to meet to try to finalize the trade deal with the US. Failure to reach an agreement could mean missing President Trump's July 4 deadline, risking a fresh round of tariff escalation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Thailand Defies Court Challenge to Push Through Crisis Borrowing
title_cn: 泰国无视法庭挑战，推动危机借贷
summary: Thailand’s government is pushing ahead with a controversial 400 billion baht ($12 billion) emergency borrowing plan despite a court challenge that threatens to complicate its response to surging energy costs and slowing economic growth.

title: EU Officials Rush to Finalize US Trade Deal
title_cn: 欧盟官员急于敲定美国贸易协议
summary: European Union officials will meet today to finalize legislation for the bloc’s trade deal with the US. Failure to reach an agreement means the EU risks missing President Donald Trump’s July 4 deadline and triggering a new round of tariff hikes. Bloomberg's Rosalind Mathieson reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Bond Market Jitters Dominate G-7 Talks
title_cn: 全球债券市场的不安情绪主导七国集团会谈
summary: Elevated bond yields dominated the Group of Seven meeting in Paris as finance ministers discussed how oil-fueled inflation risks overshadowing world economic prospects. The talks, which were meant to dwell on global imbalances, took place against the backdrop of US President Donald Trump’s extended standoff with Iran which is keeping the Strait of Hormuz shut. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Australia to Extend Life of Collins-Class Submarine as Bridge to Aukus
title_cn: 澳大利亚将延长柯林斯级潜艇作为通往奥库斯桥梁的使用寿命
summary: One of the Australian military’s oldest submarines will begin a refurbishment process as part of government efforts to ensure ongoing undersea naval power until the expected arrival of US-built nuclear vessels some time next decade.

title: EU Races to Finalize US Trade Deal to Avoid More Trump Tariffs
title_cn: 欧盟竞相敲定美国贸易协议以避免更多特朗普关税
summary: European Union officials will meet Tuesday in an effort to finalize legislation for the bloc’s trade deal with the US. Failure to reach an agreement means the EU risks missing President Donald Trump’s July 4 deadline to have the accord in place.

title: US Seeks to Drop Criminal Charges Against Gautam Adani
title_cn: 美国寻求撤销对高塔姆·阿达尼的刑事指控
summary: The US Justice Department on Monday sought to drop criminal charges against Indian billionaire Gautam Adani, taking him closer to resolving a long-running saga that once threatened the future of his giant conglomerate.

title: Defense Watchdog Will Probe US Attacks on Boats in the Caribbean
title_cn: 国防监管机构将调查美国对加勒比海船只的袭击
summary: The Pentagon’s internal watchdog will investigate whether US boat strikes in the Caribbean followed targeting guidelines, amid claims from outside groups that the attacks were illegal.

title: Australia Treasurer Defends Tax Changes as Both Fair, Attractive
title_cn: 澳大利亚财长捍卫税收改革既公平又有吸引力
summary: Australia’s Treasurer Jim Chalmers is defending proposed tax changes on capital gains and housing, arguing that they increase fairness for investors and still offer more attractive rates than overseas markets.

title: Defeated GOP Senator Cassidy Expresses Pride in Vote That Enraged Trump
title_cn: 击败共和党参议员卡西迪对激怒特朗普的投票表示自豪
summary: Senator Bill Cassidy, fresh off a political career-ending defeat, signaled Monday he’s an unfettered man who could soon become a thorn in the president’s side for his remaining months in office.

title: Deported Maduro Ally Charged With Money Laundering in US
title_cn: 被驱逐出境的马杜罗盟友在美国被指控洗钱
summary: A close associate of ousted Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro made his first appearance in Miami federal court after being sent to the US over the weekend to face money-laundering charges.

title: Georgia Voters Head to Polls in High-Stakes Primaries | Balance of Power: Late Edition 05/18/2026
title_cn: 佐治亚州选民前往高风险初选投票站权力平衡：最新版 05/18/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" is live from Georgia Tech in Atlanta, Georgia focusing on the Midterm Primaries. On today's show, Rep. Nikema Williams, a Georgia Democrat, says voters understand “what’s at stake” as the state heads into Primary Day. Allen Fromherz, director of Georgia State University’s Middle East Studies Center, says escalation against Iran is not “fully merited” after President Trump called off a planned strike, and Shawn Harris, US House Candidate (D) Georgia, states that kitchen table issues will decide who wins the Georgia primaries this Tuesday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Holding Off on New Iran Strikes After Gulf Appeal
title_cn: 特朗普表示在海湾呼吁后推迟对伊朗发动新的打击
summary: President Donald Trump said he called off a strike on Iran planned for Tuesday after an appeal by the leaders of Persian Gulf allies, who called for more time to pursue a diplomatic resolution.

title: Farmers Center of Gravity: Harris on Georgia Primary Day
title_cn: 农民重心：乔治亚州小学日的哈里斯
summary: Shawn Harris, US House Candidate (D) Georgia, states that kitchen table issues will decide who wins the Georgia primaries this Tuesday. He states that agriculture and farmers are the “center of gravity for Georgia,” and details the various issues people in the state are struggling with. He also talks about supporting the gas tax holiday, and shares his thoughts on the outcome of President Trump’s trip to China. Shawn Harris speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power” live from Atlanta, Georgia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Putin Aims to Unlock Gas Pipeline Project to China in Xi Talks
title_cn: 普京希望在习近平会谈中解锁通往中国的天然气管道项目
summary: Vladimir Putin is set to travel on Tuesday to Beijing for talks with President Xi Jinping in his first foreign visit of the year, with the war in Iran offering an opportunity for Russia to deepen energy links with China.

title: Unrest Boils in Bolivia as Some Demand President’s Resignation
title_cn: 玻利维亚动荡不安，部分人要求总统辞职
summary: Violent clashes in Bolivia intensified with protesters squaring off against security forces as food shortages stoke anger and some opponents of President Rodrigo Paz call for his resignation.
